title: Product ingredient link foundation
summary: 제품과 canonical ingredient의 사람 승인 대표 관계를 additive하게 잠그고, exact product/version identity를 보존한 DISTINCT effective-ingredient projection을 모든 required reader와 account-delete 경계에 적용한다.
goal: 제품으로 보관한 팬트리 항목도 승인된 대표 재료가 있을 때만 recipe recommendation과 후속 validation에서 같은 canonical ingredient로 인식되게 하되, 제품과 영양 version provenance는 잃지 않는다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for authoring, repair, implementation, review, security, DB, or closeout
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, backend/data implementation, security/DB review, five-axis review, behavior-only existing-consumer implementation/review, and final closeout; no session approves its own work

dependencies: account-session-generation-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1073
prepared-food-search-relevance Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1074
implementation activation requires F0 plus recipe-visibility-read-hardening (#3) joint account-delete gate; this does not block the approved Stage 0 docs sequence

external_smokes: node scripts/verify-product-ingredient-link-remote.mjs --mode post-merge-read-only from merged exact SHA only
deployed /api/v1/recipes/pantry-match implementation route smoke for official GET /recipes/pantry-match, covering unauthorized and authenticated generic/product/mixed pantry reads
remote link-table FK partial-unique RLS grant and exact-principal read-only inventory
remote private-product cascade policy and owner-null public/shared preservation read-only evidence
remote writes data promotion and account-delete activation remain zero until approved release gates

verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of all five Stage 1 core artifacts plus roadmap/status projections
separate Codex security/DB review of FK RLS grants promotion provenance and account-delete preservation
separate Codex Stage 3 and closeout review after implementation

out_of_scope: Public product-link CRUD or admin HTTP endpoints
Automatic bulk linking or approval of the 287041-row catalog
HOME product search or any new screen layout navigation or anchor-screen change
Prepared-food search relevance owned by successor #1
Personal recipe writes cooked-batch completion meal-log core or meal-log UI owned by later successors
Production account-generation or account-delete activation before F0 plus slice #3 joint gate
Unmerged remote migration production staging write or data promotion
notes: Roadmap status moves planned to docs in this Stage 1 PR, while workflow lifecycle intentionally stays planned until Stage 2. Approval remains not_started until fresh separate Codex internal 1.5, security/DB and five-axis reviewers approve with zero unresolved required findings. Stage 1 verify_commands are only current executable docs validators, focused workflow tests, lint, typecheck, dependency audit and diff check. Link/reader/account-delete/consumer tests, PostgreSQL replay, backend/frontend verification, focused Playwright and remote verifier are future Stage 2/4/closeout artifacts that must be created TDD-first. Stage 4 is behavior-only for existing HOME/PANTRY consumers and adds no visual scope. The Stage 1 author must not approve or merge its own work.
